query_spec.natural_query: VP Sales or Head of Sales at US cybersecurity SaaS startups in the United States

variants.query: VP Sales or Head of Sales at US cybersecurity SaaS startups in the United States
variants.rationale: Baseline: the natural query without any broadening.

variants.query: ("VP Sales" OR "Vice President of Sales" OR "Head of Sales") AND "cybersecurity SaaS" AND "startup" AND ("United States" OR "USA")
variants.rationale: This variant broadens the title to include both abbreviations and full forms of 'VP Sales'.

variants.query: ("Sales Director" OR "Sales Leader" OR "Sales Executive") AND "cybersecurity SaaS" AND "startup" AND "United States"
variants.rationale: This variant broadens the title to include functional synonyms for sales leadership roles.

variants.query: ("Chief Sales Officer" OR "CSO" OR "Head of Sales") AND "cybersecurity SaaS" AND "startup" AND "United States"
variants.rationale: This variant broadens the title to include C-suite forms related to sales leadership.

variants.query: ("VP Sales" OR "Head of Sales") AND ("cybersecurity SaaS" OR "information security software" OR "cyber software") AND "startup" AND "United States"
variants.rationale: This variant broadens the industry to include related terms like 'information security software' and 'cyber software'.

variants.query: ("VP Sales" OR "Head of Sales") AND ("cybersecurity SaaS" OR "network security SaaS" OR "cloud security SaaS") AND "startup" AND "United States"
variants.rationale: This variant broadens the industry to include specific subfields like 'network security SaaS' and 'cloud security SaaS'.

variants.query: ("VP Sales" OR "Head of Sales") AND ("cybersecurity SaaS" OR "data protection SaaS" OR "endpoint security SaaS") AND "startup" AND "United States"
variants.rationale: This variant broadens the industry to include niche areas such as 'data protection SaaS' and 'endpoint security SaaS'.

variants.query: ("VP Sales" OR "Head of Sales") AND "cybersecurity SaaS" AND "startup" AND ("United States" OR "USA" OR "US")
variants.rationale: This variant broadens the geography to include common abbreviations for the United States.

variants.query: ("VP Sales" OR "Head of Sales") AND "cybersecurity SaaS" AND "startup" AND ("United States" OR "North America")
variants.rationale: This variant broadens the geography to include regional terms like 'North America'.

variants.query: ("VP Sales" OR "Head of Sales") AND "cybersecurity SaaS" AND "startup" AND ("United States" OR "California" OR "New York")
variants.rationale: This variant broadens the geography to include state-level alternatives such as 'California' and 'New York'.

variants.query: ("VP Sales" OR "Head of Sales" OR "Sales Director") AND ("cybersecurity SaaS" OR "network security SaaS") AND "startup" AND ("United States" OR "USA")
variants.rationale: This variant combines title and industry broadening by including synonyms and related industry terms.

variants.query: ("Chief Sales Officer" OR "CSO" OR "Sales Executive") AND ("cybersecurity SaaS" OR "cloud security SaaS") AND "startup" AND ("United States" OR "North America")
variants.rationale: This variant combines title and geography broadening by including C-suite titles and regional terms.

variants.query: ("Vice President of Sales" OR "Head of Sales") AND ("cybersecurity SaaS" OR "data protection SaaS") AND "startup" AND ("United States" OR "California" OR "New York")
variants.rationale: This variant combines industry and geography broadening by including niche industry terms and state-level alternatives.
